ddls:
CREATE TABLE "test_cases" (
  "test_case_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test case */,
  "functionality_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the functionality being tested */,
  "test_case_name" TEXT /* Name of the test case */,
  "precondition" TEXT /* Preconditions required for the test case */,
  "step" TEXT /* Steps to execute the test case */,
  "test_data" TEXT /* Test data required for the test case */,
  "expected_result" TEXT /* Expected result of the test case */,
  "actual_result" TEXT /* Actual result obtained during test execution */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the test case (e.g., Pass, Fail) */,
  "test_case_priority" TEXT /* Priority of the test case (e.g., High, Medium, Low) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created the test case */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the test case was created */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who last modified the test case */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the test case was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_cases_functionality_id FOREIGN KEY ("functionality_id") REFERENCES functionalities ("functionality_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "functionalities" (
  "functionality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each functionality */,
  "functionality_name" TEXT /* Name of the functionality */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the functionality */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created the functionality */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the functionality was created */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who last modified the functionality */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the functionality was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("functionality_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "environments" (
  "environment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each environment */,
  "environment_name" TEXT /* Name of the environment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the environment */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created the environment */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the environment was created */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who last modified the environment */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the environment was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("environment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_executions" (
  "execution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test execution */,
  "test_case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test case being executed */,
  "environment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the environment where the test is executed */,
  "execution_date" TEXT /* Date when the test was executed */,
  "executor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the executor who executed the test */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the test execution (e.g., Pass, Fail) */,
  "test_run_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test run that this execution is part of */,
  "test_execution_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the test execution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("execution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_executions_executor_id FOREIGN KEY ("executor_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_executions_test_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_case_id") REFERENCES test_cases ("test_case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_executions_environment_id FOREIGN KEY ("environment_id") REFERENCES environments ("environment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., tester, developer, admin) */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* User ID of the manager of the user */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test result */,
  "execution_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test execution */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the test (e.g., Pass, Fail) */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment about the test result */,
  "defect_id" INTEGER /* ID of the defect reported during the test execution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_execution_id FOREIGN KEY ("execution_id") REFERENCES test_executions ("execution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bug_reports" (
  "bug_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bug report */,
  "execution_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test execution where the bug was found */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the bug */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the bug (e.g., Low, Medium, High) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the bug (e.g., Open, Closed) */,
  "reported_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who reported the bug */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the bug was reported */,
  "resolved_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who resolved the bug */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* Date when the bug was resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bug_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bug_reports_execution_id FOREIGN KEY ("execution_id") REFERENCES test_executions ("execution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_plans" (
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test plan */,
  "functionality_id" INTEGER /* ID of the functionality for which the plan is created */,
  "plan_name" TEXT /* Name of the test plan */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the test plan */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the test plan */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the test plan (e.g., Active, Completed) */,
  "test_plan_status" TEXT /* Current status of the test plan (e.g., Draft, In Progress, Completed) */,
  "test_plan_priority" TEXT /* Priority of the test plan (e.g., High, Medium, Low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_plans_functionality_id FOREIGN KEY ("functionality_id") REFERENCES functionalities ("functionality_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "plan_test_cases" (
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test plan */,
  "test_case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test case associated with the plan */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plan_id", "test_case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_runs" (
  "test_run_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test run */,
  "test_plan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test plan that this test run is part of */,
  "test_run_name" TEXT /* Name of the test run */,
  "test_run_description" TEXT /* Description of the test run */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the test run started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the test run ended */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created the test run */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the test run was created */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who last modified the test run */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the test run was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_run_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_runs_test_plan_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_plan_id") REFERENCES test_plans ("plan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "team_description" TEXT /* Description of the team */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created the team */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the team was created */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who last modified the team */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the team was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_case_dependencies" (
  "test_case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test case that has dependencies */,
  "dependent_test_case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test case that it depends on */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_case_id", "dependent_test_case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_case_history" (
  "test_case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test case */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the test case */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Description of the changes made to the test case */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who made the changes */,
  "changed_date" TEXT /* Date when the changes were made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_case_id", "version")
)
